name: Crescendo
description: The classic multiplication-table doodle with the numbers stripped away: tone deepens with row times column, while stray accent cells wander on every redraw.

code.style: --accent: @p(var(--color2), var(--color3), var(--color4)); --rule: ( margin: 0.5px; background: var(--color1); opacity: @calc(0.04 + 0.96 * sqrt((@x * @y) / (@X * @Y))); @random(${accentFrequency}) { background: var(--accent); opacity: @rand(0.5, 0.95); } transition: ease 500ms; );
code.doodle: :doodle { @grid: ${grid}; @size: ${width} ${height}; overflow:hidden; text-align:center; box-sizing:border-box } :container { background: var(--color0); overflow:hidden; }
